title: Use file-based memory instead of persistent runtime context
rationale: Fresh role sessions should resume work from auditable artifacts.

title: Use a dual-layer role system
rationale: Stage roles provide direction while task roles handle execution details.

title: First expansion focuses on product and process blueprinting
rationale: The project needs a full V1 blueprint before broad implementation work.

title: The first blueprint package must serve both internal execution and external attraction
rationale: The same product story should align future team work and explain the product to potential users.

title: External references will be systematized rather than kept as informal inspiration
rationale: The first research pass must be full-spectrum and cite external patterns explicitly.
